name: EDR Agents Actively Reporting
description: EDR agents should be actively reporting to the console. Agents that haven't checked in recently may indicate offline devices or tampering
remediation: Investigate why the agent is not reporting. The device may be offline, the agent may be corrupted, or it may have been uninstalled
remediation_steps: Check if the device is online and connected to network
Verify agent service is running on the device
Check for agent errors in local logs
If device is lost/stolen, initiate incident response
